§6Carbon Brick§f:
The §6Carbon Brick §f(advancedrocketry:misc:1) is a §ecomponent item §f in Advanced Rocketry. It is a §brequired ingredient §f in many §6carbon-based §f recipes including §6CO2 Scrubbers §f and §6carbon §f circuits.

§6Production Path§f:
- The §6Carbon Brick §f is produced by processing §6carbon §f in a §6Macerator §f or §6Compressor §f
- §eTip§f: the exact recipe is modpack-configured; check §6JEI §f for the §bcurrent §f recipe in your pack
- Yields 1× Carbon Brick per crafting operation

§6Function§f:
- §bCircuit component §f: a §6material §f in §6IC §f(advancedrocketry:ic) family recipes
- §bRequired for §f: §6CO2 Scrubber §f, §6Carbon §f circuit boards, §6Lightweight §f components
- §bNo direct tool/weapon use §f
- §bStack size §f: 64

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 49 items the Carbon Brick is a component of, including:
- §6CO2 Scrubber §f(advancedrocketry:oxygenscrubber)
- §6Carbon Mesh §f
- §6Lightweight §f components
- §6Advanced Circuit Plate §f
- §6Carbon §f smelting recipes

§6Practical Use§f:
- §eTip§f: stock up on §6Carbon Bricks §f before building §6space suits §f or §6CO2 scrubbers §f
- §eTip§f: §6carbon §f can be obtained from §6coal §f, §6charcoal §f, or §6carbon §f dusts — see §6JEI §f
- §cWarning§f: the §6Carbon Brick §f is a §6metadata variant §f of the §6misc §f item family — the §bitem ID §f is shared with §6User Interface §f (misc:0) and other parts
- §cWarning§f: §6Carbon Brick §f is §cnot §f the same as §6HBM's §fCarbon Brick — they are §bdifferent items §f in different mods
